remarks: Escape to your waterfront oasis, privately set at the end of a peaceful, desirable cul-de-sac. Offering over 3,100 sf of thoughtfully designed living space, this beautifully maintained home blends comfort elegance & effortless coastal living. Featuring 4 spacious bdrms & 3 full baths, every detail is designed for relaxation & enjoyment. Take in breathtaking views of Signal Lake from the expansive multi-level deck-the perfect setting for morning coffee, sunset gatherings or launching directly into kayaking, canoeing & paddleboarding. Just moments from the sandy shores of Compo Beach & minutes to the Westport train station, this home offers the ideal balance of tranquil waterfront living w/ easy access to NYC. At the heart of the home is an exceptional kitchen, seamlessly connected to the open-concept living & entertaining spaces-ideal for hosting family & friends. As the seasons change, unwind beside the newly appointed fireplace while enjoying the vibrant colors of autumn reflected across the water or enjoy a night under the stars at the fire pit. Experience the best of Westport, from beach days at Compo & Longshore Club to dining/shopping along charming Main Street. W/ easy access to Sherwood Island & Burying Hill beaches, recreation & relaxation are always w/in reach. Whether you're lounging on the dock, watching sunsets over the water or paddling along the river, this exceptional home offers a rare opportunity to retreat, recharge & enjoy coastal living just outside NYC.
